description: A political reporter is assigned to cover a new candidate running for office and must research their entire public history.

nodes.task_description: Search for the candidate's voting record, past held offices, and any previous campaign platforms.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a complete political history.

nodes.task_description: Investigate their business and financial history, looking for potential conflicts of interest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves financial disclosure forms and business records.

nodes.task_description: Search for any past legal issues, including lawsuits or criminal charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent performs a thorough search of court records.
